# `Poke`

**Systems:** MOS6502, Z80, Z180, M6809  
**Parameters:** `a,b,b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Pokes the specified address in parameter 1 + parameter 2 with&nbsp; the value given in parameter 3.</p>
<p><strong>Examples:</strong></p>
<p><code>poke(^$D020, 0, RED); // Red border color</code></p>
<p><code>
poke(my_array, 3, 10); // Set 3rd element of array to 10.
// Same as:
my_array[3] := 10;
</code><</p>
<p><code>
for i:=0 to b do 
   poke(my_data, i, i*2);
   </code></p>

</div>
